PhD Student Position Available in TUBITAK 1001 Project for Understanding Neural/Glial Biology Underlying Metabolic Adaptation

We are looking for an enthusiastic PhD Student to work in Asst.Prof. Yasemin Onder’s TUBITAK

1001 Project entitled: “Structural and Metabolic Analysis of Astrocytic GABA Transporter GAT3

as a Therapeutic Target” The goal of this project is to understand the link between astrocytes

and metabolism, and computational analysis of astrocytic GABA transporter GAT3 as a potential

therapeutic target. This project is multidisciplinary combining computational methods such as

in silico drug design, homology modelling, molecular dynamic analysis and wet-lab methods,

including cell culture, molecular biology, advanced imaging and mouse models. It is a great

opportunity for a candidate that is interested in both computational and wet-lab studies.

Duration of the project is 36 months (with one year additional support for PhD students by

TUBİTAK). Scholarship for PhD students is 24.000₺ (up to 30.000₺ with the additional life

support fund provided by Kadir Has University).

For more information on NeuroBM Lab please check: https://neurobm.khas.edu.tr/ and

https://www.linkedin.com/company/neurobm-laboratory/

https://x.com/NeuroBm_Lab

Requirements:

– MSc degree in Molecular Biology, Neuroscience or a similar field preferred for PhD applicants

(or will receive MSc degree by Dec, 2024). Must be in good standing (GPA at least 3/4).

– Must have wet-lab experience (at least 2 years).

– Experience with cell culture and using aseptic method is desired. Previous work experience

with primary neuron and astrocyte cultures is a big plus. Experience with dissecting mouse

brain tissue is a big plus.

– Preferably experienced with basic molecular biology and biochemistry methods such as :

qPCR, cloning, DNA/RNA isolation, western blot.

– Preferably experienced working with mouse tissue and mouse handling. Experimental animal

use certificate will be a bonus.

-Basic coding skills such as Phyton and R studio is desirable.

– Experience and knowledge for microscope is a plus.

– Fluent English is necessary. Please send applications in English.

– Adaptable, flexible, curious, team-player, problem-solver and open to learning/ operating new

devices. Must be able to work in a fast-paced environment.

Interested candidates please send your CV, cover letter and contact information for two

references to

[email protected]

. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an

interview at Kadir Has University and will be requested reference letters. Applications will be

accepted until Jan,20 2025.
